title: GPP cpassword Extraction

stages.name: SYSVOL enumeration
stages.result: Full SYSVOL tree enumerated. Groups.xml found in {CORPLAB-GPP-TEST} policy folder.
stages.detection_note: EC5140 not observed — SMB share browse indistinguishable from normal GP pull

stages.name: Groups.xml download
stages.detection_note: File read over SMB — no event log entry

stages.name: cpassword decryption
stages.command: python3 AES-CBC decrypt with published Microsoft key
stages.detection_note: Local offline computation — zero network activity

detection_summary.notes: Fully silent. SMB file read indistinguishable from normal Group Policy operations. No reliable reactive detection exists.

remediation: Apply MS14-025 — disables GPP password storage
Audit SYSVOL for XML files containing cpassword attribute
Delete all GPP files with cpassword
Rotate all credentials ever stored via GPP
Deploy LAPS for local admin account management
